verses.4: Praise him, you heavens of heavens,
verses.5: Let them praise the LORD’s name,
verses.6: He has also established them forever and ever.
verses.7: Praise the LORD from the earth,
verses.8: lightning and hail, snow and clouds,
verses.11: kings of the earth and all peoples,
verses.13: Let them praise the LORD’s name,
verses.14: He has lifted up the horn of his people,
